actions.name: create_repository
actions.risk: creates a Bitbucket repository in the configured workspace

actions.name: create_issue
actions.risk: creates a visible Bitbucket issue and may notify repository participants

actions.name: create_pull_request
actions.risk: creates a visible pull request and may notify reviewers

actions.name: merge_pull_request
actions.risk: merges a pull request into its destination branch

actions.name: run_pipeline
actions.risk: starts a Bitbucket pipeline run that may consume CI minutes and deploy artifacts

actions.name: create_webhook
actions.risk: creates an outbound webhook that sends repository events to an external URL

actions.name: delete_webhook
actions.risk: deletes a repository webhook and may interrupt downstream automation

actions.name: create_snippet
actions.risk: creates a Bitbucket snippet that may publish code or text content
